title: thelypteris stenura
intro: Thelypteris stenura, also known as the Japanese maiden fern or Stenura fern, is a species of fern native to Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris stenura include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in traditional Japanese medicines such as Kampo.
